issues.description: Missing entire second effect: [Activate: Main] DON!! −1, You may rest this Character: Look at 1 card from the top of your opponent's deck.

SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Must specify: kind='ByType', type='BigMomPirates' AND kind='ByCost', minCost=2 (not maxCost=2). Current filter only checks cost ≤2, missing type filter and correct cost direction.

SearchDeck does not reflect 'Look at 5 cards from top' → 'reveal up to 1' → 'place rest at bottom in any order' workflow. Requires condition/optional reveal logic and deck reordering action not present.
